participation of all the planets in the 4th and 10th Houses constitutes Vihaga (Pakshi) Yoga.
Should all the planets be in mutual Trines, avoiding the Ascendant, Hala Yoga is formed. All
planets relegated only to the Ascendant and its Trines give rise to Sringataka Yoga.
16. CHAKRA AND SAMUDRA YOGAS.
Should all the planets occupy alternative Rasis commencing from the Lagna, Chakra Yoga is
formed. If these occupy alternative Rasis from the 2nd onwards, Samudra Yoga is formed.
17. Thus, I have explained the twenty different Akriti Yogas. Now, I explain the Asraya Yogas, as
per the schools of thought of senior Garga etc.
18. ASRAYA AND DALA YOGAS.
Should all the planets be in Dual Rasis, Nala Yoga is formed. Similarly, if these are in Fixed
Rasis, Musala Yoga takes place and in Movable Rasis Rajju Yoga is formed. All Angles
occupied exclusively by benefics cause Maala Yoga, while malefics in all Angles produce
Sarpa Yoga. These two are Dala Yogas.
19. SANKHYA YOGAS.
